response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with nearly two decades of full-stack work, strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React experience, hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work (a required and rare skill), and deep testing culture (TDD, test-framework authorship, Selenium training). Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL, and Java exposure round out the requirements. Gaps are modest: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience, and much of the systems-level depth is in D, a niche language outside the primary stack.
strengths: Recent, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience
Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React product experience at scale with testing and craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Broad polyglot background spanning cloud, containers, databases, and high-throughput backend systems
concerns: Kotlin absent; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Significant career investment in D-language ecosystem, less transferable to the primary stack

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node/React full-stack depth with testing rigor
